methodology: Static code trace audit — traced instantiation sites, call sites, decision influence points, and consumption chains for each SDE component across the entire HARMONY-X codebase.
key_findings: _seed_semantic_hypotheses is dead code: defined and tested but never called from any pipeline path (orchestrator, strategist.run_intervention_round, or toy victim experiments).

_rescore_with_semantic adds a FLAT bonus (alpha * boundary_uncertainty) to ALL candidates, preserving relative ranking. Cannot change selection except for breaking ties. Decision influence is effectively zero when all scores are distinct.
MultiDimensionalBoundaryEstimator._reset() is NOT called in engine._reset() — state leaks across engine.initialise() calls.
PromptEmbeddingStore.get_diverse_candidates() is never called externally — defined but unused.
engine.get_routing_history() is never called externally — only defined.
BoundaryAwareStrategist.propose_utility_probes() is defined but never called from any pipeline path.

components.call_count_estimate: ~40-80 per toy victim run (1 init + 2*N rounds for propose/observe + 1 get_semantic_evidence + 1 get_state)
components.notes: Core orchestrator of SDE lifecycle. All methods are actively consumed by experiments or tests. get_routing_history() is dead code (defined but never called).

components.call_count_estimate: ~21 per run (observe() called each round + estimate() via get_multi_dim_estimate())
components.notes: Data is collected (observe() called per round) but NEVER used for any decision. get_multi_dim_estimate() is called in tests only, not consumed by any production decision. engine._reset() does NOT reset this estimator, causing state leakage across initialise() calls. PASSIVE COMPONENT — collects data but does not influence any outcome.

experiments/toy_victim_test.py:327-328 — concepts logged to JSON output (logging only, no decision)

decision_points: agents/strategist.py:721 — gates semantic rescoring: if not informative, no score adjustment
agents/strategist.py:963 — gates hypothesis seeding: if not active or no concepts, return 0 (but seeding is never called)
components.notes: Correctly instantiated and consumed. is_informative() gate works. However, the data driving it comes from the engine which requires observations > 0. During a fresh pipeline run, the first N design_intervention calls will get inactive() evidence because the engine has not yet accumulated observations.

decision_points: NEVER CALLED FROM ANY PRODUCTION PATH — not called from design_intervention, run_intervention_round, Orchestrator.run(), or any experiment entry point.
components.notes: DEAD CODE in production. The method is defined (198 lines), tested, and compiles cleanly, but no production code path ever invokes it. It is not called from design_intervention(), run_intervention_round(), Orchestrator.run(), or any experiment runner. To be effective, it must be explicitly called — likely from Orchestrator.run() after each synthesis cycle.

call_sites.context: Called from design_intervention() when engine is connected and evidence is informative

decision_points: agents/strategist.py:941-947 — adds FLAT bonus (alpha * boundary_uncertainty) to ALL candidates. Since bonus is identical for every candidate, relative ranking does not change. Only changes selection when two candidates have identical scores (breaking ties). In practice, intervention candidates rarely have identical scores.
components.notes: CRITICAL DESIGN FLAW: The method adds the SAME bonus value to EVERY candidate score. This means the relative ordering of candidates is completely preserved. The method can only change which intervention is selected if two candidates had exactly the same score (a tie). In practice, intervention candidate scores (EFE or delta) are floating-point values, so ties are extremely rare. Even when called, this method has effectively ZERO influence on decisions. To have real influence, the bonus should be proportional to EACH candidate's properties (e.g., how well each prompt probes the semantic boundary), not a flat additive term.

zero_decision_influence: Strategist semantic rescoring (_rescore_with_semantic — flat bonus preserves ordering)
recommendations: 1. Call _seed_semantic_hypotheses from Orchestrator.run() after each synthesis cycle, OR remove it as dead code.
2. Fix _rescore_with_semantic to use a PROPORTIONAL bonus (per-candidate semantic relevance) instead of flat bonus.
3. Either wire MultiDimensionalBoundaryEstimator into a real decision (e.g., intervention selection) or remove it.
4. Either wire PromptEmbeddingStore diversity into real candidate selection or remove it.
5. Call engine._reset() on multi_dim_estimator to fix state leakage.
6. Remove get_routing_history() and get_diverse_candidates() if they remain unused.
